message:
fix(signal): support Windows compilation via low-level signal registration

Replace signal_hook::iterator (Unix-only) with signal_hook::low_level::register
on Windows. Replace non-existent libc::SIGBREAK with signal_hook::consts::SIGBREAK
(or const literal in const fn context). Enables cross-platform builds of
downstream crates like franken_whisper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
